tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control (prediabetes/early diabetes). Creatinine is mildly elevated, suggesting possible early renal impairment. Lipid profile reveals high total cholesterol and LDL, increasing cardiovascular risk. Glucose, urea, electrolytes, and triglycerides are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation and management of glycemic control, renal function, and dyslipidemia.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: KfH-Nierenzentrum am Klinikum Freising
